title: molinia caerulea var. arundinacea
intro: Molinia caerulea var. arundinacea, also known as purple moor-grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of purple moor-grass include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for various health issues. Purple moor-grass can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
